description_long: This object consists of three flat, rectangular panels arranged in a V-shaped configuration, with a fourth matching panel positioned parallel to one of the open sides. The panels are thick and solid, with smooth, unadorned surfaces and sharp, clean edges, giving the object a modern and minimalistic appearance. The open V-formation creates a partially enclosed space, suggesting it could function as a corner cabinet, a divider shelf, or a modular storage unit. There are no visible handles, doors, or decorative features, and the surfaces appear to be made of a uniform, matte material, likely painted wood or laminate. The object is freestanding and could be placed against a wall or in an open area to provide storage or display space. Its neutral color and simple geometry make it suitable for a variety of urban environments, such as offices, lobbies, or public waiting areas.
description: A modern, V-shaped cabinet or shelf with three thick, smooth panels and a fourth panel set apart, all in a uniform light color. The design is minimalistic and freestanding, suitable for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the panels and the separation between the main V-structure and the single panel.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the open V-shape and the spacious interior formed by the three connected panels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the separation between the V-structure and the single panel, with clear panel thickness.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full width of the V-structure and the alignment of the panels.
